title: PendingHooks
description: Pending hooks truth file — unresolved cliffhangers, promises, and expected resolutions. Part of the 7 truth files per REQ-F-14. Mirrors HookRecordSchema.

version.description: Schema version for future migration support.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this file was last modified.

hooks.description: List of tracked hooks (cliffhangers, promises, mysteries, etc.).

startChapter.description: Chapter where this hook was first introduced.

status.description: Hook status: open | progressing | escalating | critical | resolved | deferred. escalating/critical are high-priority variants of progressing.

lastAdvancedChapter.description: Most recent chapter where this hook was advanced or mentioned.

expectedPayoff.description: Planned payoff or resolution description (e.g. 'protagonist discovers the relic is a key to the ancient seal').

payoffTiming.description: Expected timing: immediate | near-term | mid-arc | slow-burn | endgame.

notes.description: Additional context or reminders about this hook.
